description: PR-10 mock-exam assembler + readiness engine review (companion to pr10-mock-assembler.md).
method: operator adversarial self-audit of mock_exam.py + readiness_report against determinism, holdout isolation, allocation correctness, and readiness math; plus a comprehensive test suite (14 mock/readiness tests). An INDEPENDENT agent review was dispatched.

operator_findings.problem: time_management_performance reported 0.0 when no timing data existed, unfairly penalizing readiness
operator_findings.fix: exclude the component (None) when time_management.total is 0

verified_invariants: determinism (sha256 rank, sorted domains, allocation sums to count)
scenarios drawn holdout-only; practice scenarios never used as mock scenarios
grade_mock returns ids/accuracy only, no holdout stems/choices
readiness weights renormalized over available components; div-by-zero guarded; hard blockers fire
note: Per the PR-9 lesson, findings from the pending independent review will be applied in a PR-10 follow-up if any; this record is updated at that time. This JSON does NOT claim a clean independent review before it has reported.
